description_long: This is a structured, rectangular red leather backpack with a glossy finish, commonly known as a Japanese randoseru. The main body is a vibrant red with white stitching outlining the edges and seams, giving it a crisp, defined look. The front panel is smooth and features two metallic rivets at the bottom, while the sides have additional compartments with metallic hardware and decorative stitching. The back is padded with a beige cushion for comfort and has two adjustable shoulder straps, also in red with white accents. The top features a sturdy handle for hand carrying, and the overall construction appears robust and high-quality. The bag is designed to be both functional and stylish, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A glossy red leather backpack with white stitching, metallic hardware, and padded beige back support. It features a structured, rectangular shape and adjustable shoulder straps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth red flap with white stitching and two metallic rivets at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side compartment with metallic hardware and decorative stitching.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the padded beige back support and two adjustable red shoulder straps.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side compartment and hardware details.
attribute_strap_type: Two adjustable shoulder straps and one short top handle, all attached with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap closure with metallic snap fasteners at the bottom of the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: White stitching along the edges and seams, metallic rivets and hardware.
